gigapan.description:
From the roof of the RV on Monday as we work to pack up.  The city is disapearing.  There is a man working on the tech tower, and the Burning Man Earth camp is all gone except for us, and a bit of clean water poured out where camp used to be.

The cameras are all dust coated - including inside the optics and on the sensors, so there is some strong vignetting in the gigapan.  Oh well.  If your camera isn't covered in dust by the end of the even than you probably were not taking very many pictures!
